## Public Notes

Build the Japan Studio / Team Ico packet around public studio-history sources, official title pages, interviews, and preservation-safe lineage notes.

## Inputs

- official title pages
- public interviews
- studio reorganization records

## Outputs

- standalone archival packet
- studio lineage map
- public-source bibliography

## Blocked By

- japan-studio-team-ico-triage
